name: idle-resource-remediator
description: Scans AWS accounts for idle resources, validates with 60-day CloudWatch metrics, and safely remediates waste with mandatory snapshots, safety checks, and explicit double confirmation

agentSpawn.command: aws sts get-caller-identity --output json 2>&1 || echo '{"error": "No valid AWS credentials found"}'

welcomeMessage: I'll scan your AWS account for idle resources and safely remediate waste. Let me first check your permissions, then tell me which region to analyze.
